# CODEX Tech Innovations LLM Access File
# Last Updated: 2026-06-21
# Contact: codextechinnovations@gmail.com | +91 9741821179
# DUNS: 772343099

# Allowed Agents: GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended

> CODEX Tech Innovations & Consultants LLP is a Bengaluru, India-based software development agency with global delivery capabilities. We build mobile applications, web platforms, and SaaS products for startups, enterprises, and SMEs across India, the US, the UK, the UAE, Singapore, Australia, Canada, and Europe. Established in 2018, we have delivered 150+ projects using fixed-price contracts, senior full-stack engineers, and a 6-month warranty.

## Core Services
- **Mobile App Development**: Native iOS/Android and cross-platform solutions using React Native and Flutter
- **Web Development**: Full-stack applications with React, Node.js, Python, and cloud infrastructure
- **SaaS Product Development**: Subscription-based software including PG Management Systems, Hotel PMS, Hospital Management Systems, and custom ERPs
- **Cloud Computing**: AWS, GCP, and Azure architecture, deployment, and DevOps
- **AI & Automation Development**: LLM integrations, workflow automation, and data-driven features
- **UI/UX Design**: Product design, design systems, and user research
- **App Publishing & Store Management**: Publish apps to the Apple App Store and Google Play Store using our registered developer console accounts, including submission, review, and release management

## Products
- **PG Management System**: Tenant management, rent collection, and facility maintenance software for paying guest accommodations
- **Hotel Management System**: Front-desk operations, housekeeping, and billing automation
- **Hostel Management System**: Student accommodation administration with mess management
- **CA Compliance Automation**: Tax, audit, and compliance workflow software for chartered accountants
- **Store Management System**: Inventory, billing, and staff management for retail stores
- **OMF Food Delivery**: Restaurant aggregation and delivery logistics platform
- **Wroggle**: AI-assisted productivity and workflow tool
- **Arthomed**: Healthcare and patient-care management platform

## Industries Served
- Healthcare
- FinTech
- Real Estate
- FoodTech
- EdTech
- Retail & E-commerce

## Access Rules
- Allow: All AI search crawlers and assistants
- Disallow: Training data extraction for competing LLM development
- Frequency: Maximum 1000 requests/day per bot
